ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Domain name of the website */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the website */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the website (e.g., e-commerce, blog) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the website */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the website was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the website's data was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the website (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The primary IP address of the website */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the website's server is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region where the website's server is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the website's server is located */,
  "organization" TEXT /* The organization that owns the website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The contact email for the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tls_configurations" (
  "tls_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLS configuration */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the TLS configuration belongs to */,
  "tls_host" TEXT /* TLS host of the website */,
  "tls_port" INTEGER /* TLS port of the website */,
  "tls_version" TEXT /* TLS version of the website */,
  "tls_cipher" TEXT /* TLS cipher of the website */,
  "ssl_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether SSL is enabled */,
  "ssl_version" TEXT /* The SSL version */,
  "ssl_cipher" TEXT /* The SSL cipher */,
  "ssl_cert_expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the SSL certificate */,
  "ssl_cert_issuer" TEXT /* The issuer of the SSL certificate */,
  "ssl_cert_subject" TEXT /* The subject of the SSL certificate */,
  "ssl_cert_serial_number" TEXT /* The serial number of the SSL certificate */,
  "ssl_cert_fingerprint" TEXT /* The fingerprint of the SSL certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tls_configurations_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tls_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLS certificate */,
  "tls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TLS configuration the certificate belongs to */,
  "subject_dn" TEXT /* Subject DN of the TLS certificate */,
  "subject_cn" TEXT /* Subject CN of the TLS certificate */,
  "issuer_dn" TEXT /* Issuer DN of the TLS certificate */,
  "issuer_cn" TEXT /* Issuer CN of the TLS certificate */,
  "cert_type" TEXT /* The type of the certificate (e.g., DV, OV, EV) */,
  "cert_expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the certificate */,
  "cert_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the certificate */,
  "cert_serial_number" TEXT /* The serial number of the certificate */,
  "cert_fingerprint" TEXT /* The fingerprint of the certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tls_certificates_tls_id FOREIGN KEY ("tls_id") REFERENCES tls_configurations ("tls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web server */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the web server belongs to */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the web server */,
  "server_version" TEXT /* Version of the web server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* The type of the web server (e.g., Apache, Nginx) */,
  "server_os" TEXT /* The operating system of the server */,
  "server_architecture" TEXT /* The architecture of the server */,
  "server_location" TEXT /* The physical location of the server */,
  "server_status" TEXT /* The status of the server (e.g., running, down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_servers_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the access log belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the website */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the website was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* The exact time when the access was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "https_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HTTPS setting */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the HTTPS setting belongs to */,
  "https_status" TEXT /* HTTPS status of the website (e.g., enabled, disabled) */,
  "https_version" TEXT /* HTTPS version of the website (e.g., HTTPS/1.1, HTTPS/2) */,
  "hsts_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is enabled */,
  "hsts_max_age" INTEGER /* The max-age of the HSTS policy */,
  "hsts_include_subdomains" INTEGER /* Whether subdomains are included in the HSTS policy */,
  "hsts_preload" INTEGER /* Whether the HSTS policy is preloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_https_settings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security configuration */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the security configuration belongs to */,
  "security_status" TEXT /* Security status of the website (e.g., secure, insecure) */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the website (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_scan_date" TEXT /* The date of the last security scan */,
  "scan_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of security scans (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "scan_status" TEXT /* The status of the last scan (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "scan_result" TEXT /* The result of the last scan (e.g., secure, insecure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_configurations_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the vulnerability belongs to */,
  "vulnerability_name" TEXT /* Name of the vulnerability */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the vulnerability (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* The date when the vulnerability was discovered */,
  "fixed_date" TEXT /* The date when the vulnerability was fixed */,
  "CVE" TEXT /* The Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the vulnerability */,
  "exploitability" TEXT /* The exploitability score of the vulnerability */,
  "impact" TEXT /* The impact score of the vulnerability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vulnerabilities_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "csp_settings" (
  "csp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CSP setting */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the CSP setting belongs to */,
  "csp_policy" TEXT /* CSP policy for the website */,
  "csp_report_only" INTEGER /* Whether the CSP is in report-only mode */,
  "csp_report_uri" TEXT /* The URI to which CSP reports are sent */,
  "csp_policy_version" TEXT /* The version of the CSP policy */,
  "csp_policy_description" TEXT /* A description of the CSP policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("csp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_csp_settings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cdn_settings" (
  "cdn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CDN setting */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the CDN setting belongs to */,
  "cdn_provider" TEXT /* CDN provider for the website (e.g., Cloudflare, Fastly) */,
  "cdn_status" TEXT /* CDN status for the website (e.g., enabled, disabled) */,
  "cdn_region" TEXT /* The region where the CDN is located */,
  "cdn_caching" TEXT /* The caching settings of the CDN */,
  "cdn_security" TEXT /* The security settings of the CDN */,
  "cdn_performance" TEXT /* The performance settings of the CDN */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cdn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cdn_settings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favicon_settings" (
  "favicon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favicon setting */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the favicon setting belongs to */,
  "favicon_url" TEXT /* URL of the favicon for the website */,
  "favicon_type" TEXT /* The type of the favicon (e.g., .ico, .png) */,
  "favicon_size" INTEGER /* The size of the favicon in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favicon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favicon_settings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dns_settings" (
  "dns_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNS setting */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the DNS setting belongs to */,
  "dns_provider" TEXT /* DNS provider for the website (e.g., Cloudflare, Google) */,
  "dns_status" TEXT /* DNS status for the website (e.g., enabled, disabled) */,
  "dns_record_type" TEXT /* The type of DNS record (e.g., A, AAAA, CNAME) */,
  "dns_ttl" INTEGER /* The time-to-live (TTL) of the DNS record */,
  "dns_mx_priority" INTEGER /* The priority of the MX record (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dns_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dns_settings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ips_settings" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP setting */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the IP setting belongs to */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the website */,
  "ip_type" TEXT /* The type of IP address (e.g., IPv4, IPv6) */,
  "ip_status" TEXT /* The status of the IP address (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ips_settings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports_settings" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port setting */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the port setting belongs to */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Port number of the website */,
  "port_protocol" TEXT /* The protocol used by the port (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "port_status" TEXT /* The status of the port (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ports_settings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)
